mapper.select: /** 구버전 교육내역 개수 */ select count(1) from ktl_edu_master kem, ktl_edu_item kei, ktl_edu_member kemm, ktl_member km where 1=1 and kem.idx_edu_master = kei.idx_edu_master and kei.idx_edu_item = kemm.idx_edu_item and kemm.idx_member = km.idx_member and km.login_id = #{userId}

/** 구버전 교육내역 페이징 */ select kem.edu_year, kem.edu_nm, kei.idx_edu_item, kei.idx_edu_master, kei.chasu, kei.dt_edu_start, kei.dt_edu_end from ktl_edu_master kem, ktl_edu_item kei, ktl_edu_member kemm, ktl_member km where 1=1 and kem.idx_edu_master = kei.idx_edu_master and kei.idx_edu_item = kemm.idx_edu_item and kemm.idx_member = km.idx_member and km.login_id = #{userId} order by kem.edu_year
LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{row}
